query:
SELECT
                kia.id AS "id!: Uuid",
                kia.issue_id AS "issue_id!: Uuid",
                kia.user_id,
                kia.assigned_at AS "assigned_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
               FROM kanban_issue_assignees kia
               JOIN kanban_issues ki ON ki.id = kia.issue_id
               WHERE ki.project_id = $1
